ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the pathway was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the pathway was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bacteria" (
  "bacterium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bacterium */,
  "bacterium_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bacterium */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain identifier of the bacterium */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bacterium's characteristics */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Indicates if the bacterium is genetically modified */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the bacterial strain */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bacterium was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bacterium was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bacterium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bacterium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metabolic_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metabolic rate entry */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the pathway */,
  "bacterium_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the bacterium */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Measured metabolic rate of the bacterium in the given pathway */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mg/L/h) */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the experiment */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metabolic rate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the metabolic rate */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the metabolic rate was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the metabolic rate was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metabolic_rates_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metabolic_rates_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metabolic_rates_bacterium_id FOREIGN KEY ("bacterium_id") REFERENCES bacteria ("bacterium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the pathway */,
  "bacterium_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the bacterium */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the experiment */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample used in the experiment */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was performed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_bacterium_id FOREIGN KEY ("bacterium_id") REFERENCES bacteria ("bacterium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the experiment */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, table) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was last modified */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last modified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_bacteria" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the pathway */,
  "bacterium_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the bacterium */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_bacteria_bacterium_id FOREIGN KEY ("bacterium_id") REFERENCES bacteria ("bacterium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_bacteria_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., mg/L/h) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the unit was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the unit was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the methodology was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the methodology was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the experiment */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the specific conditions of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the condition entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the condition entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
